intro: From a closed schoolhouse to a thriving community of homes — a few milestones along the way.

milestones.title: A landmark is built
milestones.body: The schoolhouse opens, designed by Proudfoot, Bird & Rawson, and becomes a fixture of Jefferson life.

milestones.title: The doors close
milestones.body: After a century of students, the building closes — and its next chapter begins to take shape.

milestones.title: Restoration recognized
milestones.body: Developer Chris Deal earns a Housing Impact Award from the Ames Regional Economic Alliance for the project.

milestones.title: Tours begin
milestones.body: Self-guided tours open to the community as progress accelerates inside the building.

milestones.title: Open house
milestones.body: The public is welcomed in to see the transformation firsthand.

milestones.title: Welcome home
milestones.body: The Jeffersonian opens its doors to its first residents.
